text.title: event-sourcing-basics Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the event-sourcing-basics methodology end-to-end.

step.name: model-events
step.action: Name events in past tense (one per state change).

step.name: scaffold-aggregate
step.action: Implement Aggregate base with _apply dispatch + version tracking.

step.name: write-handlers
step.action: Author apply_<event_name> handlers; never mutate state outside them.

step.name: plan-schema-evolution
step.action: Document additive-field policy + Vn class naming.
step.decision-gate: If new events are needed mid-flight, version them (OrderPlacedV2) rather than mutating existing schemas.
